Fire should be kindled on a sacrificial altar made to the west
or to the south of the mystic circle, and all the following necessary
sacrificial materials collected on the altar, viz. long (uncut) blades
of Darbha grass that do not contain tender sprouts inside, fried
grains, ghee, coloured rice, curd, honey, white mustard seeds, per-
